name: Spit Roasted Whole Pork Loin with Fresh Rosemary and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 15 pounds pork loin (chine bone removed, rib bone in)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a pocket through the center of the pork loin.
2. Work 1 tablespoon of the dry rub mixture into the loin and rub the rest of the rub over the outside.
3. Rub well to ensure even coating. Let sit tightly covered in the refrigerator for 30 hours.
4. Place the loin on the spit with a drip pan and heat the grill to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Cook for 45 minutes, reserving juices.
6. De-fat the cooking juices and add 1/2 cup coffee. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Serve with sliced pork loin.
